findings.issue: Decisions 3, 5, and 6 lack an explicit "Alternatives considered" line. Decisions 1, 2, and 4 include it; the rest provide only Decision + Rationale.
findings.fix: Add a short "Alternatives considered:" line to Decisions 3, 5, 6 (e.g., for Decision 3: default col-0 sort — rejected because the feature is disk-fill triage; for Decision 6: recordable now — rejected, record/report is the next phase). If no real alternative existed, state "None — forced by ADR-004".

summary: APPROVED. Zero critical findings. All template sections present and non-empty; frontmatter valid (created 2026-06-21, status draft, branch feature/replication-slots, size M). 6 tasks (<=15), all with valid catalog skills (code-writing, deploy-pipeline, pre-deploy-qa) and existing reviewer agents (dev-code-reviewer, dev-test-reviewer, dev-deploy-reviewer all verified on disk). Task descriptions are brief WHAT+WHY scope statements — no step-by-step, no line-number refs, no AC/TDD anchors, no embedded technical decisions (all decisions live in the Decisions section). Final Wave present with Pre-deploy QA (Task 6). Wave/dependency structure is sound and matches the expected shape: Wave 1 Task 1 & 4 independent (disjoint files); Wave 2 Task 2 & 5 depend on Wave 1 (disjoint files); Wave 3 Task 3 depends on Task 2. No same-file wave conflicts, no circular dependencies, no time-based estimates. File paths and naming conform to architecture.md and patterns.md (bgwriter reference pattern). Only one minor finding: three Decisions omit an explicit Alternatives line.
